name: Sauteed Garlic Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 large Tomato, seeded and chopped, or
recipeInstructions:
Use up to 3 tbsp of cheese, according to taste.
1. In a bowl or blender, combine vinegar, lemon juice, and mustard.
2. In a small skillet, heat olive oil over low heat. Add garlic cloves; sauté until just golden brown.
3. Gradually whisk in the vinegar mixture, blending thoroughly. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Pour dressing over salad bowl containing lettuce and tomato. Sprinkle walnuts and cheese evenly over the salad before serving.
